## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss content strategy and production for Mindr and GrowthX collaboration across multiple brands.](https://fathom.video/share/gdaq5FC_EvgxiPEERXSj3KdL1xVxitf5?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production ramping up: \~20-25 articles coming next week, then 10/week](https://fathom.video/share/gdaq5FC_EvgxiPEERXSj3KdL1xVxitf5?tab=summary&timestamp=1386.0)
  - [Expanding focus beyond DUI.org to include Intoxalock and Breathe Easy brands](https://fathom.video/share/gdaq5FC_EvgxiPEERXSj3KdL1xVxitf5?tab=summary&timestamp=1444.0)
  - [Need to refine personas/topic clusters by product line in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/gdaq5FC_EvgxiPEERXSj3KdL1xVxitf5?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Legal review process may become bottleneck; prioritizing DUI.org content first](https://fathom.video/share/gdaq5FC_EvgxiPEERXSj3KdL1xVxitf5?tab=summary&timestamp=1033.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Status and Plans

  - [3 initial calibration articles completed; Brian to give final review](https://fathom.video/share/gdaq5FC_EvgxiPEERXSj3KdL1xVxitf5?tab=summary&timestamp=99.0)
  - [Aiming for 3-4 line paragraphs max, preferably 2-3 lines](https://fathom.video/share/gdaq5FC_EvgxiPEERXSj3KdL1xVxitf5?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [Week 1 articles pending feedback on calibration pieces](https://fathom.video/share/gdaq5FC_EvgxiPEERXSj3KdL1xVxitf5?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [Expecting \~1 month lead time before publishing](https://fathom.video/share/gdaq5FC_EvgxiPEERXSj3KdL1xVxitf5?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Adding "Legal Review" column to content tracking sheet](https://fathom.video/share/gdaq5FC_EvgxiPEERXSj3KdL1xVxitf5?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)

### Content Strategy Across Brands

  - [Expanding focus beyond DUI.org to include Intoxalock and Breathe Easy](https://fathom.video/share/gdaq5FC_EvgxiPEERXSj3KdL1xVxitf5?tab=summary&timestamp=1444.0)
  - [Jessica to share SEO agency's blog topic recommendations for these brands](https://fathom.video/share/gdaq5FC_EvgxiPEERXSj3KdL1xVxitf5?tab=summary&timestamp=993.0)
  - [Aiming for 8 Intoxalock : 2 Breathe Easy ratio for next batch](https://fathom.video/share/gdaq5FC_EvgxiPEERXSj3KdL1xVxitf5?tab=summary&timestamp=1118.0)
  - [Goal: \~20-30 articles per brand for optimal keyword coverage/analysis](https://fathom.video/share/gdaq5FC_EvgxiPEERXSj3KdL1xVxitf5?tab=summary&timestamp=1147.0)

### Workflow and Tools Overview

  - [Jimmy showcased backend processes: 20-step workflow including AI and human elements](https://fathom.video/share/gdaq5FC_EvgxiPEERXSj3KdL1xVxitf5?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
  - [Team interested in deeper dive on tools/processes in future meetings](https://fathom.video/share/gdaq5FC_EvgxiPEERXSj3KdL1xVxitf5?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
  - [Using Airtable as central "content OS" for tracking and collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/gdaq5FC_EvgxiPEERXSj3KdL1xVxitf5?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)

### Persona and Topic Cluster Refinement

  - [Need to update Airtable with product-specific personas and topic clusters](https://fathom.video/share/gdaq5FC_EvgxiPEERXSj3KdL1xVxitf5?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Brian to help flesh out persona details across brands](https://fathom.video/share/gdaq5FC_EvgxiPEERXSj3KdL1xVxitf5?tab=summary&timestamp=1686.0)
  - [Lauren to share keyword libraries and topic cluster info for Breathe Easy](https://fathom.video/share/gdaq5FC_EvgxiPEERXSj3KdL1xVxitf5?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)

### Content Review Process

  - [Brian to review latest articles, then pass to legal if ready](https://fathom.video/share/gdaq5FC_EvgxiPEERXSj3KdL1xVxitf5?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
  - [Potential bottleneck at legal review stage; prioritizing DUI.org content](https://fathom.video/share/gdaq5FC_EvgxiPEERXSj3KdL1xVxitf5?tab=summary&timestamp=1033.0)
  - [Prateek to send \~20-25 articles for review in coming week (catch-up from backlog)](https://fathom.video/share/gdaq5FC_EvgxiPEERXSj3KdL1xVxitf5?tab=summary&timestamp=1386.0)

### Plagiarism Concerns

  - [Jessica inquired about plagiarism checks](https://fathom.video/share/gdaq5FC_EvgxiPEERXSj3KdL1xVxitf5?tab=summary&timestamp=1969.0)
  - [Team assured robust AI+human process prevents direct copying](https://fathom.video/share/gdaq5FC_EvgxiPEERXSj3KdL1xVxitf5?tab=summary&timestamp=1901.0)
  - [Offer to run plagiarism reports on spot-check basis if needed](https://fathom.video/share/gdaq5FC_EvgxiPEERXSj3KdL1xVxitf5?tab=summary&timestamp=1944.0)
